chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-2023 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case (Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 7938/25 3.For hearing of main case 17-12-2025 Mr. Nadeem Khan Lashari, Advocate for the petitioners. M/s Agha Athar Pathan, Assistant A.G and Imran Mobeen, APG a/w SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur and SIP Ghulam Nabi Shaikh, I.O of the case. **** Counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
